objective:
sum_{j=1}^{30} A_j * rho_j(x)
where rho_j(x) = - (exp(-mu_j^2 * r) + 2*exp(-mu_j^2*(x2^2 + x3^2)) + 2*exp(-mu_j^2*x3^2) + 1) / mu_j^2
r = x1^2 + x2^2 + x3^2
A_j = 2*sin(mu_j)/(mu_j + sin(mu_j)*cos(mu_j))
mu_j: first 30 positive roots of tan(mu) = mu
constraints: termB = sum_{i=1}^{29} sum_{j=i+1}^{30} A_i * A_j * rho_i(x) * rho_j(x) * (sin(mu_i+mu_j)/(mu_i+mu_j) + sin(mu_i-mu_j)/(mu_i-mu_j))
